name: Speedy Cash
description_short: At 2926 Lamar Ave Ste 109, Memphis, TN 38114, Speedy Cash can be reached at +1 901-744-3230.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a short-term lending provider operating physical retail locations across the Memphis, Tennessee area, including the Summer Avenue store in Memphis, TN 38122. The company positions itself as a neighborhood financial services provider offering quick access to emergency cash through multiple loan products designed for consumers facing immediate financial needs. With branding emphasizing "Tomorrow can be payday®," Speedy Cash caters to individuals who need funds before their next paycheck or who lack access to traditional lending options. The company has been established long enough to operate multiple locations throughout the Memphis area and maintain an active online presence.

Speedy Cash offers three primary loan products at their Memphis Summer Avenue location: Payday Loans up to $425 (due on or around the next payday), Lines of Credit up to $4,000 (with flexible draws and repayment over time), and Title Loans up to $4,000 (secured by vehicle collateral with appraisal provided in-store). Beyond lending, they provide money services including money orders, wire transfers, check cashing, and Green Dot Visa Debit Card services. Applications can be initiated online but require in-store completion, allowing customers to ask questions and review terms before signing. The company emphasizes transparency about costs and terms prior to loan approval.

Speedy Cash distinguishes itself through its physical retail presence and in-person service model, which appeals to customers who prefer face-to-face interaction when applying for loans. Their multiple Memphis-area locations (at least 9 stores listed) provide geographic convenience for local residents. The company offers flexible credit products—including lines of credit that allow borrowers to access funds as needed—rather than only single fixed-amount loans. They also bundle financial services like check cashing and wire transfers, creating a one-stop shop for emergency cash needs. Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm on Mondays and Fridays) accommodate working individuals.

However, Speedy Cash operates in the high-cost lending space with documented regulatory restrictions (note about title lending in Alabama being 30-day pawns and clear title requirements varying by state), suggesting these loans carry significant costs. The maximum payday loan amount of $425 is relatively low and may not cover larger emergencies. While the website states customers will "know exactly how much it costs," specific APR, fees, and total cost information is not disclosed on this page, making transparent comparison difficult. Title loans require vehicle collateral and insurance, limiting accessibility. For consumers with credit challenges, this remains a more expensive alternative to traditional banking.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multiple loan products available ($425 payday loans, $4,000 lines of credit, $4,000 title loans) providing flexibility for different borrowing amounts
Nine store locations across Memphis area providing physical accessibility and in-person service for customers who prefer face-to-face interaction
Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm Monday and Friday) accommodate working individuals unable to visit during standard business hours
Online application option available to start process remotely, then complete in-store with agent assistance
Lines of credit offer flexibility to draw funds as needed rather than lump sum, with credit limit refreshing as balance is paid down
In-store team reviews loan options and explains terms before application, allowing customers to ask questions
Additional financial services (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, Green Dot cards) available at same locations
cons: Specific APR, interest rates, and fee information not disclosed on website, making cost comparison and transparency difficult
Maximum payday loan of $425 is low and may not cover larger emergency expenses
Title loans require vehicle as collateral and proof of insurance, limiting access for those without vehicles
State-specific restrictions noted (Alabama title pawns, clear title requirements in Mississippi/Nevada/Texas) suggest regulatory complexity and higher costs in some jurisdictions
No mention of loan denial alternatives or credit-building resources for customers with poor credit history
best_for: Employed individuals with immediate cash needs before payday who prefer in-person application assistance
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency loans ($2,000-$4,000) willing to use car title as collateral
Consumers without bank accounts or credit access seeking check cashing and wire transfer services alongside lending
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed individuals in the Memphis area with immediate cash needs who have either stable income (for payday loans) or vehicle collateral (for title loans) and prefer in-person service. The primary caveat is that specific pricing, APR, and total cost information are not disclosed on their website, making it impossible to assess whether these loans are competitively priced compared to credit unions, payday alternative loans, or other emergency lending options—and given the regulatory restrictions noted, costs are likely substantially higher than traditional lending.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card services
In-store loan applications with agent assistance
Vehicle appraisals for title loan collateral
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
